title: Mellow Umami Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with umami noodles, mellow vegetables, and chinese seasonings.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mellow and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped chow and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the umami noodles to the skillet and stir in the shaved parmesan.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
